overview.description: AI-powered voicebots for automated outbound customer engagement
overview.description_long: Semantee builds AI voice agents for B2B customer engagement automation. Their platform enables businesses to deploy outbound voicebots that reactivate dormant customers, collect feedback, schedule appointments, qualify leads, conduct CATI surveys, and handle collections — across 50+ languages. They also deliver custom AI solutions including computer vision for product recognition. Based in Prague and currently in private beta, their clients include ČEZ, Grohe, SC&C, Kantar, and unnamed Czech banks and pharmacies.
overview.tagline: AI-powered voice remarketing that keeps you engaged with your customers

history.origin_story: Founded in late 2024 by Ben Fistein (former management consultant) and Cyril Höschl (Ph.D. in Computer Science, Image Processing) with the mission to create practical AI applications that generate win/win scenarios for customers.

key_milestones.event: Launched private beta; secured clients including ČEZ, Grohe, SC&C, and a major Czech bank

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Semantee operates in the AI voice agent space, which is dominated by well-funded global competitors (Retell AI, Bland AI, Vapi, ElevenLabs) and increasingly by OpenAI, Google, and Microsoft with native voice automation. The core product is largely built on top of commodity LLM/TTS APIs with limited proprietary moat, making it easy for larger players to replicate at scale.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The AI-powered outbound calling/voicebot market is real and growing, with legitimate enterprise clients (ČEZ, Grohe) showing validated demand. However, the market is extremely competitive globally and the company is in very early stage with private beta status, making sustained growth uncertain.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding identified. Founded late 2024, the company is a very early stage startup with at most 2 known team members. Without disclosed funding, runway is limited and the company faces significant risk if early revenue does not materialize quickly.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Combination of high AGI displacement risk (commoditizing voice AI market), high funding risk (no known external capital, tiny team), and strong global competition makes this a high-risk company despite initial traction with enterprise clients like ČEZ and Grohe.

metadata.notes: Very early-stage startup founded late 2024, currently in private beta. Website canonical URL is semantee.ai (also accessible at semantee.com). Legal entity: Semantee s.r.o., Prague 8 (Nad Okrouhlikem 17, 18200). Blog posts by Ben Fistein date back to May 2024 pre-founding. No LinkedIn data accessible (auth wall). Founders: Ben Fistein (management consultant background) and Cyril Höschl Ph.D. (CS/Image Processing).
